word: G4401 - προχειροτονέω - procheirotonéō - prokh-i-rot-on-eh'-o - Choose before

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προχειροτονέω

- Transliteration: Procheirotoneo

- Phonetic: prokh-i-rot-on-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to choose or designate beforehand

- Origin: from G4253 and G5500

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G5500; to elect in advance: - choose before.
